evidence.scientific_clarity: Volcano plot clearly shows up/down/NS groups with correct threshold lines and top-5 gene labels, fully addressing the brief.
evidence.typography: Script omits pdf.fonttype=42; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmapped) DejaVuSans fonts — text is not selectable/editable in the PDF. DejaVu Sans is the matplotlib default.
evidence.palette: Blue (down) / red (up) / grey (NS) is directionally disciplined and avoids green/red confusion; blue-red may still be problematic for protanopia/deuteranopia.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout used, no gaping whitespace, top/right spines removed, y-range sensible; top-5 labels use offset points and stroke to avoid overlap.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption contains unfilled placeholder '$n=$ up' — the upregulated count was never substituted, which Reviewer 2 would immediately flag.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdffonts reports Type 3 (non-embedded, bitmapped) fonts; text is not selectable. Script does not set rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (206 KB), figure.png (110 KB), figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption has a literal LaTeX placeholder '$n=$ up' (unfilled count); the intended numerical claim is absent, making the caption scientifically incomplete.

overall_strengths: Figure clearly communicates differential expression with correct coloring, threshold lines, and gene annotations — strong scientific execution.
All required output files (PDF, PNG, SVG, caption, script) are present and non-trivial in size.
overall_weaknesses: PDF uses bitmapped Type 3 fonts (no pdf.fonttype=42 set), making text non-selectable and non-editable — a critical submission-readiness failure.
Caption contains an unfilled placeholder ('$n=$ up') that omits the upregulated-gene count, rendering the stated numerical claim incomplete.
